displayNotes: Use cards for scanability on iPhone: one primary number, status pill, and 2–3 details.
Use baseline/range visualization for HRV and RHR because personal baseline matters more than population comparison.
Use progress bars for readiness, sleep score, Body Battery, stress, steps, intensity minutes, training load, and nutrition.
This morning run explicitly marks the Garmin source as latest complete day rather than same-day because early 2026-06-21 data was mostly empty/null.

Source fields include training readiness, HRV baseline, sleep score/duration/stages/need, Body Battery start/end/high/charge/drain, stress average/max/rest split, steps/distance/active calories, weekly intensity minutes, acute load/ACWR, VO₂ max, nutrition calories/protein/water, resting HR vs 7-day average, SpO₂, and respiration.
